title: Policy Analysis
shortSummary: Learn to evaluate, design, and advocate for public policy. Understand cost-benefit analysis, regulatory impact statements, evidence-based policy, and the policy cycle from agenda-setting to evaluation.
whyItMatters: Policy is the substance of politics. Without the ability to analyse policy rigorously, politicians are just performing — they cannot actually govern. The best politicians combine political skill with genuine policy expertise.
coreConcepts: The policy cycle: agenda, formulation, adoption, implementation, evaluation
